series.curator_notes: Main series consists of 16 numbered episodes (Folge 1-16) from the TV series, released 2019-2022. Earlier individual story releases from 1984-2014 are excluded as duplicates since their content is included in the numbered episodes. The 'Findus erklärt die Welt' spinoff series (10 albums) is excluded as it's an educational non-fiction series. Multiple movie adaptations and music albums are also excluded. No Retro-Archiv or Junior variants found for this series.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.
